name: degrande-bullet-threading
description: Degrande Bullet Threading is a Logseq DB-first bullet threading scaffold with expressive motion, color controls, and a publish-ready setup.
author: mugpet
title: Degrande Bullet Threading

scripts.prepare:bundle: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@logseq/libs/dist/lsplugin.user.js', 'lsplugin.user.js'); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@logseq/libs/dist/lsplugin.user.js.LICENSE.txt', 'lsplugin.user.js.LICENSE.txt'); console.log('Copied lsplugin.user.js and license')"
